counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS/workflows/schemas before task actions, used canonical entity resolution for Juniper, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox requested: 'OCR all bills related to Juniper'. Canonical entity record (10_entities/cast/juniper.md) established identifier Juniper. Searches and file reads in 50_finance/purchases confirmed three related bills, each containing bill fields and line items in table text but lacking YAML frontmatter. I added schema-compliant bill frontmatter to all three and kept body text intact, then deleted the processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
